1. Login: FSM authenticates via SSO on the rugged device; session token issued and account context loaded.
2. Rooftop Selection: FSM selects the dealer group account (if multi-tenant) and the rooftop to audit; confirms start to open an audit session tied to that rooftop.
3. Scanning: FSM scans each vehicle VIN via barcode/QR or manual entry; live tally of Scanned/Pass/Exceptions visible in header.
4. Scan Result: System returns device status in real time (Pass or Exception with type) plus required action and per-vehicle data; FSM proceeds to next vehicle or ends audit.
5. End Audit Confirm: FSM confirms end of session; sees 3-stat summary card (Scanned/Pass/Exceptions) and rooftop name before committing.
6. Session Complete: Standardized CSV report generated; FSM downloads, reviews filterable vehicle list, and chooses New audit or Finish.

1. Login: Logs in once with SSO credentials; expects fast load and no multi-system juggling.
2. Rooftop Selection: Picks the correct rooftop from a filtered dropdown; taps Start audit.
3. Scanning: Walks the lot, points scanner at windshield VIN; falls back to manual entry on read failure; watches running tally.
4. Scan Result: Reads Pass/Exception status and required action; takes corrective field action if needed; taps Next vehicle.
5. End Audit Confirm: Reviews session totals; confirms or cancels end of audit.
6. Session Complete: Downloads CSV; filters list by All/Pass/Exception; starts new audit or logs out.

1. Login: Not active in flow; relies on user provisioning being correct so the right FSMs can log in.
2. Rooftop Selection: Has previously assigned rooftops to the account so FSM sees only authorized locations.
3. Scanning: Not active in flow; trusts that scans are scoped to their account_id and rooftops only.
4. Scan Result: Not active in flow; downstream consumer of exception data for compliance follow-up.
5. End Audit Confirm: Not active in flow; visibility comes after session close.
6. Session Complete: Receives/accesses account-scoped CSV reports; uses exception counts and rooftop name to track install penetration and compliance across their dealer group.

1. Login: SSO IdP; user table with account membership; auth API; multi-tenancy account_id resolution (FR-008, FR-011).
2. Rooftop Selection: Rooftop table scoped by account_id; rooftop_name resolution (E6-05); session create endpoint; FR-009/FR-012.
3. Scanning: POST /audit/scan-vin; VIN decode service for make/model/year (E6-01); barcode/QR scanner (Zebra TC58 SE4720 + DataWedge); active network connectivity.
4. Scan Result: scan-vin response with status + exception_type + make/model/year (E6-01); status classification rules; PlanetX device-status lookup; FR-003/FR-007.
5. End Audit Confirm: Session summary endpoint GET /audit/session-summary (E6-02); rooftop_name (E6-05); open-session detection with exception_count (E6-04).
6. Session Complete: GET /audit/session-scans (E6-03); CSV report generator (function 11_generate_csv_report); session close + summary endpoints; account-scoped report access (FR-013).

1. Login: SSO success rate; login time to Rooftop Selection (target < a few seconds); auth error rate.
2. Rooftop Selection: Time-to-start-audit (Login → Scanning); rooftop selection error rate (wrong-rooftop incidents target = 0 via account scoping).
3. Scanning: Scan time per vehicle (target ≤ ~45 sec); barcode/QR scan success rate (target > ~95%); manual VIN entry rate (target < ~5%); VIN validation error rate.
4. Scan Result: Exception identification accuracy; classification correctness vs. PlanetX ground truth; scan-to-result latency; exception rate per session.
5. End Audit Confirm: End-audit confirmation rate (vs. cancel); summary accuracy (counts match persisted scans); time on confirm screen.
6. Session Complete: Total audit time per dealership (target ≤ ~1.7 hrs, ~58% reduction); audits per FSM per day (target ~2.4x baseline); CSV download success rate; FSM satisfaction vs. legacy 3-system process.
